sourceMovie.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 (2013) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 clicked for you, Despicable Me 2 (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2?
faq.answer: Try Despicable Me 2, Minions, Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs—each shares DNA with Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2?
faq.answer: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 (2013) is best described as Animation, Family, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
